faqs.question: How can I tell if I have carpenter ants versus regular ants in my Woodside home?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ants are significantly larger than common household ants (typically ¼ to ½ inch long) and are usually black or dark brown. Key signs include piles of sawdust-like wood shavings near baseboards or windowsills, faint rustling sounds inside walls, and winged ants emerging in spring. If you see large black ants or suspect wood damage, contact us for a professional inspection.
